title: node/stack: receive() allocates Vec on every call
description: In stack.rs:355, let mut ipv6 = vec![0u8; 256]; allocates on every receive, then immediately truncates. Consider reusing a buffer owned by Stack (rx_ipv6_buf field) to avoid repeated allocations in a receive loop.
close_reason: 256-byte Vec allocation per receive is negligible. Buffer reuse would require API changes. Optimize when profiling shows bottleneck.
